offer: A daily greens powder with 25 fruits and vegetables, probiotics, and adaptogens. For busy people who don't eat enough veggies and want more steady energy and better digestion.

creative.headline: Veggies you'll actually drink
creative.primaryText: Most of us don't eat enough vegetables. One scoop of our greens blend mixes 25 fruits and veggies, probiotics, and adaptogens into a glass — an easy daily habit for people who want more steady energy and easier digestion. Individual results vary.

creative.headline: Clinically proven energy boost
creative.primaryText: Stop feeling sluggish by 2pm. Our clinically proven greens formula floods your body with 25 superfoods so you feel energized all day. Thousands have made the switch.

findings.title: Unsubstantiated "clinically proven" claim
findings.why: Saying something is "clinically proven" without a study to back it up reads as misleading and draws extra review.
findings.suggestedFix: Drop "clinically proven," or only use it if you can link a real study on the landing page.
